feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: #COE#BUMA OSS Case Dashboard and SAP For Me Cases API with ServiceNow
entry.content:
Hello All,

Are there any API related between SAP For Me OSS Cases and ServiceNow. We want to automate the creation of incident ticket once an OSS case is created. Automation involves when the OSS case was updated, the SNOW ticket will also be updated in the worknotes. Also, is there a dashboard where we can utilize in SAP For Me to see the report overview of all the OSS case status besides the SAP For Me > Services & Support > Cases.

Thank you!

entry.title: #COE#BUMA CPI Monitoring. Automation for extracting errors and long processing processes
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is there a way to create a monitoring dashboard in CPI monitoring that lists the long running processes and error messages?

Currently there is a way to check all error messages but cannot be exported (i.e. in excel file for tracking purposes).

We also have iflows that runs for hours, so we need to monitor proactively if processed successfully.

TiA!

entry.title: API for Custom fields
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

I added custom fields in the SAP Public Cloud Service Contract.

I want to integrate the data of the added custom fields with an external system.

In this case, is it necessary to create an API (External API) for the added custom field?

 

Soma

entry.title: 2408 update VAT on Retention Payment to Supplier for UAE
entry.content: What are the specific improvements introduced by this feature, and what functionalities have been enabled as a result? Additionally, why is this feature particularly necessary in the context of the United Arab Emirates (UAE)?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAC import connection setting failure
entry.content:
I'm currently working on an import connection between my company's SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAC.
I am proceeding with the work based on the contents of the blog below, but I am having trouble creating "Communication Arrangement".

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition%E3%81%A8sap-analytics-cloud%E3%81%AE%E6%8E%A5%E7%B6%9A%E6%96%B9%E6%B3%95/ba-p/13569275

In particular
・New Communication System：Creation Success
System ID : SAC_INTEGRATION_0087
System Name : SAC Integration
・New Communication User：Creation Success
User Name: SAC_COMM_USER
Description: SAC Integration
・New Communication Arrangement：Creation failure
Scenario: SAP_COM_0087
Arrangement Name: SAP_COM_0087
・About the failure situation
"SAP_COM_0087" could not be selected in the New Communication Arrangement/Scenario column.
Could someone please tell me how to resolve it?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Deletion of Duplicate work agreement in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

For some contingent resource, there are some duplicate worker agreement has created.

 

Kindly help us with the steps and procedure to delete worker profile and worker profile from Manage workforce App.

 

It will be helpful for us to work on this.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: value date is not shown in the "Display Line item in general ledger"
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

 

We are not able to reconcile bank entry based on value date. As the value date column in not shown in the "Display Line item in general ledger."  Please resolve the same as soon as possible as it is creating  a lot of chaos and we are not able to track payment based on value date.

 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue eDocument Cockpit Greece - MyData
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

We received the following error from MyData in Greece for our Invoice. 

S:101:000 Line:1.Position:1020.The element 'invoice' in namespace 'http://www.aade.gr/myDATA/invoice/v1. 0' has invalid child element 'invoiceSummary' in namespace 'http://www.aade.gr/myDATA/invoice/v1.

Do you know how we can overcome that?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: ES version, if there are more than 100,000 fixed assets, the impact on the operation of the system
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud 公共版#SAP S4HANA Cloud 公共版财务#SAP S4HANA Cloud ;在 SAP ES 版本中，如果固定资产超过 100,000 个，对系统运行的影响，系统运行是否非常缓慢？

entry.title: App Manage Bank Accounts (F1366A) – Error in create payment groups
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Trying to execute the scope Basic Bank Account Management (BFA) we have noticed that the app Manage bank accounts doesn’t appear to create the payment group, we tried to create using CBC however is not reflecting the right way at Fiori

Reference test done:

Manage Bank Account App

Select the bank account and click on go in the upper right.

Displaying on the screen click on Edit in the upper right.

Search for: Payment Approvers

When we click on approver group we cannot find any group created

 

CBC configuration done:

We created the group “test”

Can you please check the reason for this “error”? Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,

entry.title: Automatic payments – payment data is not transferred to Payment proposal
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When performing Automatic payments, payment data is entered in journal entry or assigned in App Manage Supplier Line Items.

When the payment proposal is created, this payment data is lost and payment needs to be reallocated again.

The error shown in exceptions is No Valid Payment Method Found

In app Manage Automatic Payments in View Log the following is displayed 


goto View log herein you will see the following stated 
> House bank is selected ...
> No suitable bank can be selected for comp.code & pmnt meth. & curr. &  (& in place of actual values shown)
> No permitted payment method exists 



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Public-Sales-Billing form -txt n' logo-What is the right masterform template for GB (great britain)?
entry.content:
I would like to know what is the right Master form for GB Billing form templates.

I've tried to use: 

SOMU_FORM_MASTER_LETTER
SOMU_FORM_MASTER_A4

 

Both of them the Header text (company address) doesn't appears in the output document.

I've checked and the footer is working fine, so I suppose its something related to the page size.

I've been doing this configuration for Brazil and with A4 the header text is there, but for GB none of the 2 options doesnt work.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: 653 movement type in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

we faced that error massage when we did 653 movement type. There are not Q - VAY row in that movement type. Which movement type we can use instead of 653?

Thank you,

entry.title: #service document Cannot find customer group 1-5 in service order
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I cannot find customer group1-5 in the service order. But I can see these fields in the service order item CDS view. How can I enter these fields in the service order?

entry.title: How to perform foreign currency valuation using functional currency for selected vendor or customers
entry.content:
In the "Perform Foreign Currency Valuation" tile, valuation posting is based on company code currency. Notice that there is Advanced Foreign Currency Valuations using "Schedule General Ledger Jobs" tile to perform valuation on functional currency (Perform Foreign Currency Valuation with the new Advanced Valuations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud). However, it doesn't allow users to select specific vendors or customers, meaning that all AR and AP items will be included in foreign currency valuation posting.

May I check how to cater both requirements?

  1. use functional currency for foreign currency valuation
  2. allow users to select specific vendors or customers for foreign currency valuation

entry.title: Deactivation and archivisation of users
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We would like to know how you recommend handle this manually and also by automatic job so:
1. How to manually archive inactive users? Access to archived users shoould be restricted, and personal data should be removed as much as possible to achive anonymisation required by GDPR - how to do that?

 

2. If we decide that manual activities requires too much time we would like to have an option to configura archiving job that will archive inactive users after certain amount of days after they ware inactivated. How to create and configure such automatic job? 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with Creating an Extended Situation Type for Outbound Delivery Notifications in SAP S/4HANA Cl
entry.content:
I’m currently working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud and facing a challenge while trying to create an extended situation type to send notifications when an outbound delivery is updated. However, when I attempt to create the situation object, I notice that there is no event object for outbound deliveries in the ABAP category — only for inbound deliveries.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue, or can you suggest a workaround for setting up event-based notifications for outbound deliveries?

entry.title: Custom CDS view for Invoice Summary Creation
entry.content:
We would like to create a customized Invoice Summary for our customers by modifying the standard Invoice Summary template and linking it to other systems.

However, the standard CDS view for the Invoice Summary has not yet been released. Additionally, we understand that there is currently no API available, and the scalability of the standard functionality is limited.

Although this requirement is already listed for development in the Customer Influence platform, no announcement has been made regarding its release timeline. This creates a significant risk to our project schedule.
(https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/322650/?section=sectionDetails)

Given the high likelihood that the necessary SAP development will not be completed in time, we need to explore alternative solutions. Do you have any suggestions?

entry.title: Purchase Requisition Release Date
entry.content:
We need a CDS view which will reflect the actual release date / Purchase Requisition Workflow End Date of a Purchase requisition.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to deploy Custom UI5 application onto SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public edition?
entry.content:
Hi community,
I have a scenario for creating a custom application and deploying it as a tile on the S4 HANA Cloud Public edition's FLP.

Using eclipse ADT, I have connected my dev system of HANA Public Cloud, and created a Custom Package under the Super package ZCUSTOM_DEVELPOMENT (so that the development objects can be moved to T and P systems).

My custom package holds the following objects:

  1. Custom database tables
  2. Custom ABAP Classes to handle the logic on the tables
  3. The IAM application / Business Configurations (based on few tables) to maintain data from the user side
  4. Custom root view entities on top of the ABAP classes
  5. The  service bindings and service definitions of the custom root view entities (their respective authorization objects).
  6. Custom Business catalog to store the IAM applications which are published to the HANA Cloud.

Process: (Backend)

  1. Created custom Z* Package to store the custom build objects.
  2. Created database tables to store the data.
  3. For a few tables, the business configuration objects are created to expose those tables on the HANA Cloud to maintain data.
  4. Created custom ABAP classes to handle the logic on the data in the custom tables.
  5. Created custom root entities and implemented the if_rap_query_provides~select method to handle the HTTPS calls when the root entities are exposed as an API. (Ref: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-a4c-create-custom-entity.html)
  6. Created a service definition for the custom root entity.
  7. Created service binding on top of the service definition to expose them as an OData V4 API.

Process: (Frontend)

  1. Create BTP destination do SAMLAssertion authentication type to connect the HANA cloud system. (Ref: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/31876c06f99645f289d802f9c95fb62b.html?locale=en-US)
  2. Created a custom UI application using the template.
  3. Consume the exposed Odata V4 services in the application by providing the endpoints in manifest.json file, configure the BTP destination in UI5.yaml and xs-app.json file to connect the application to backend system.
  4. The application loads successfully and in the preview mode and the data flows in preview mode.
  5. Build the mta.yaml file to generate the .mtar file.
  6. Deploy the .mtar file to deploy the application to BTP.
  7. On successful deployment, the application is available under HTML5 Applications in BTP.

After performing all these step, how can we add this developed custom application as a FIORI tile onto the S4 HANA Public cloud FLP under a custom catalog, Custom role, custom space and page?

Tried Scenario:

  1. Create a custom tile using the application Custom Tiles on HANA Cloud Public edition FLP.
  2. Provided the deployed application URL in the details of the custom tile.
  3. During assigning the catalog, The custom catalog in which the IAM applications are added is not visible in the list of catalogs to assign. Rather it shows all the SAP Standard business catalogs

How to add this custom tile to the custom business catalog created using ADT on eclipse?

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.
